programme.title: WayV 威神V 'BIG BANDS (狂想曲)' MV
programme.desc: WayV's title track “BIG BANDS” is an upbeat dance song packed with lively brass, rhythmic beats, and jazzy elements. Its powerful groove and catchy chant vocals leave a strong impression. With lyrics about creating a massive energy that moves the soul, the song captures WayV's confidence and bold vibe. The music video shows the members embracing their unique characters as they “redesign” and transform the world, brought to life with eye-catching visual effects and dynamic performances.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'STYLE' MV
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' new single ‘STYLE' is an uptempo dance track featuring lively rhythms and groovy bass. The members' bright and bubbly vocals come together to deliver a feel-good energy, capturing Hearts2Hearts' cheerful and lovable charm.

programme.title: BoA 'Crazier' Intro
programme.desc: As her first full album in five years, Crazier is sure to be a meaningful treat for fans who've supported her throughout the years.In celebration of her 25th debut anniversary, BoA is set to drop her 11th full-length album 'Crazier' on August 4. Packed with 11 tracks that range from high-energy dance hits to emotional ballads, including self-written songs, the album showcases her signature versatility.

programme.title: BoA 'Crazier' MV
programme.desc: BoA's title track "Crazier," which she personally participated in writing and composing, is a pop punk song that blends an addictive guitar riff with a refreshing vibe. Her signature powerful vocals further enhance the track's completeness. BoA is releasing her 11th full-length album, "Crazier," in celebration of the 25th anniversary of her debut. The lyrics deliver a bold and confident attitude that playfully twists today's world, capturing an energy that's sure to cool down the sweltering summer.

programme.title: aespa 'Dirty Work' MV
programme.desc: “Dirty Work” is a dance track with catchy synth bass and cool vocal melodies, showing off a more Chill and Cool side of their sound. In the music video, the members turn into bold resistance fighters who take on any kind of “dirty work” for each other, highlighting their strong sense of unity. The performance blends fierce, powerful moves with a hint of sensual flair, creating a stage that's full of contrast and energy.

programme.title: Stupidly Love
programme.desc: Even the imperfect moments are just part of true feelings. Dive into these lovable songs that capture the fluttering, stumbling heart of falling in love!

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'CHILLER' MV
programme.desc: Both double title tracks, 'CHILLER' and 'BTTF,' were written by hitmaker KENZIE, creating a seamless narrative connection. NCT DREAM's title track 'CHILLER' stands out with its experimental sound rooted in French touch, with standout electronic textures and unpredictable progressions. Notably, 'CHILLER' serves as both a prequel and sequel to 'BTTF,' offering a deeper experience when listened to together.The lyrics playfully depict the cool and confident 'CHILLER' enjoying their brightest moments, signaling the start of a new chapter for NCT DREAM.

programme.title: HYO 'YES' MV
programme.desc: Hyoyeon (HYO) brings refreshing, upbeat energy to beat the summer heat with her new single 'YES.' 'YES' is a Sped-Up House track driven by a two-step rhythm and rhythmic bassline. The sophisticated and energetic production is elevated by a bold, captivating topline that enhances the overall vibe of the song.

Its powerful groove and catchy chant vocals leave a strong impression. With lyrics about creating a massive energy that moves the soul, the song captures WayV's confidence and bold vibe. The music video shows the members embracing their unique characters as they “redesign” and transform the world, brought to life with eye-catching visual effects and dynamic performances.

programme.desc: Feel the breeze of youth — NCT DREAM's refreshing playlist for bright upbeat days.

programme.title: KEY 'HUNTER' MV
programme.desc: SHINee's KEY's title track “HUNTER” is a dance song combining grand bass, heavy kicks, rhythmic guitar riffs, and rich synth pads. Its lyrics capture the “ecstasy in pain” of obsession within a complex relationship, heightened by KEY's dynamic vocals. KENZIE, who has worked on KEY's signature songs, took part in the writing and composing, showcasing their trusted synergy. The performance features refined choreography that highlights KEY's delicate expressiveness and intense energy, delivering a conceptual stage that captivates from start to finish.

programme.title: NCT WISH 'SURF' MV
programme.desc: Filmed entirely on location in Bali, the music video showcases the group's refreshing charm against a backdrop of lush nature. Through the lighthearted story of a surfing club's training camp, 'SURF' amplifies the vibrant summer vibes even further.NCT WISH's latest track 'SURF' is a hybrid dance-pop summer song featured on their 3rd mini album 'COLOR', marking their first summer release since debut. Built on funky, heavy rhythms layered with refreshing sounds, lyrical melodies, and clear, transparent vocals, it delivers a cool burst of energy. The lyrics liken the thrill and freedom of youth to surfing, capturing the excitement of riding the waves.
